creator: tg@ihf.rwth-aachen.de
text:
Dag-Erling =?UNKNOWN?Q?Sm=F8rgrav?= <finrod@niobe.ewox.org> writes:

> >Description:
> 
> The teTeX-0.4 port installs a version of GNU install-info 

This will be fixed in teTeX-0.9.

> >Fix:
> 
> One of the following:
> 
>     a) Do not install install-info with the teTeX-0.4 port / package.

Personally, I always removed it after the installation.

>     b) Use an absolute path to install-info in make installworld.

This would be even better since the additional options haven't been
integrated into the mainstream texinfo sources, AFAIK.

tg
